video_info.title: UEFA Europa League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Freiburg face Aston Villa in a high-stakes final, with both teams eager to finish their campaigns with silverware and a statement win. Freiburg have relied on disciplined defending and strong team cohesion, while Villa come in brimming with attacking firepower and confidence. Who will rise to the occasion? Catch all the action from the UEFA Europa League 2025-26 final, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
